reviews.review_title: I am FredвҖҷs with the owner of this game

reviews.review_description:
THIS GAME IS SO UNDERRATED. NEEDS MORE ATTENTION. Seriously though this game is actually the best and here are reasons.

The game modes are very fun and relaxing! Besides horror.

The free cosmetics! There is an og badge for free and collectibles when you beat Lava rising or horror.

The staff and owners are great and overall an amazing community.

If you know addine or Moondrop46531 a six year old well I am his brother and if you ever give them mod can you please give me mod as well and by the way I really like your game it is a start to a brand new game that IвҖҷm sure everyone wants to play
Well done on making this game, it is at an early development
